---
name: Submit New Question
about: Propose a new Java / Spring / System Design interview question to add to the question bank
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: 'question-submission'
assignees: ''
---

**Topic Category**
Select one category:
- [ ] AI & LLM Integration
- [ ] Behavioral & STAR
- [ ] Collections
- [ ] Databases
- [ ] Exceptions
- [ ] General Java
- [ ] JVM & Memory
- [ ] Kafka & Messaging
- [ ] Live Coding & Refactoring
- [ ] Modern Java 21+
- [ ] Multithreading
- [ ] OOP
- [ ] Patterns
- [ ] Spring Framework
- [ ] Stream API
- [ ] System Design
- [ ] Testing

**Difficulty Level**
- [ ] Junior
- [ ] Middle
- [ ] Senior

**Question Title**
State the question clearly as asked in technical interviews.

**Detailed Answer / Solution**
Provide a comprehensive answer, including code snippets or diagrams if applicable.

**Tags / Keywords**
e.g. `virtual-threads`, `concurrency`, `spring-boot`, `g1gc`
